formulas.name: Attack (no accuracy)
formulas.description: Standard attack roll. After importing, replace +0 with your total modifier, such as +2 or -1.

formulas.name: Accuracy 1
formulas.description: Add highest of 1d6. After importing, replace + 0 with your modifier, such as +2 or -1.

formulas.name: Accuracy 2
formulas.description: Add highest of 2d6. After importing, replace + 0 with your modifier, such as +2 or -1.

formulas.name: Difficulty 1
formulas.description: Subtract highest of 1d6. After importing, replace + 0 with your modifier, such as +2 or -1.
